# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent container security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:22.04

LABEL maintainer="devteam@example.com"
LABEL description="Multi-service development container with web server, API server, PostgreSQL, and Redis"

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get upgrade -y && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    nginx \
    nodejs \
    npm \
    postgresql \
    postgresql-contrib \
    redis-server \
    supervisor \
    gosu \
    ca-certificates \
    curl \
    && apt-get clean \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/* /tmp/* /var/tmp/*

RUN groupadd --system appgroup && \
    useradd --system --gid appgroup --no-create-home --shell /usr/sbin/nologin apiuser

RUN mkdir -p /var/log/supervisor /var/run/supervisor && \
    chmod 750 /var/log/supervisor /var/run/supervisor

RUN mkdir -p /app/api && \
    chown -R apiuser:appgroup /app/api && \
    chmod 750 /app/api

COPY --chown=apiuser:appgroup api/ /app/api/

RUN mkdir -p /etc/nginx/ssl && \
    chmod 700 /etc/nginx/ssl

RUN rm -f /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default

COPY config/nginx/default.conf /etc/nginx/sites-available/default
RUN ln -s /etc/nginx/sites-available/default /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default && \
    nginx -t

COPY config/redis/redis.conf /etc/redis/redis-secure.conf
RUN chmod 640 /etc/redis/redis-secure.conf && \
    chown redis:redis /etc/redis/redis-secure.conf

COPY config/postgresql/pg_hba.conf /etc/postgresql-custom/pg_hba.conf
RUN chmod 640 /etc/postgresql-custom/pg_hba.conf

COPY scripts/init-db.sh /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/init-db.sh
RUN chmod 750 /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/init-db.sh

COPY config/supervisord.conf /etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf
RUN chmod 644 /etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf

COPY scripts/entrypoint.sh /usr/local/bin/entrypoint.sh
RUN chmod 755 /usr/local/bin/entrypoint.sh

COPY scripts/healthcheck.sh /usr/local/bin/healthcheck.sh
RUN chmod 755 /usr/local/bin/healthcheck.sh

RUN mkdir -p /run/secrets && \
    chmod 700 /run/secrets

RUN find /app -type f -name "*.js" -exec chmod 640 {} \; 2>/dev/null || true && \
    find /app -type d -exec chmod 750 {} \; 2>/dev/null || true

EXPOSE 80
EXPOSE 8080
EXPOSE 5432
EXPOSE 6379

HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=10s --start-period=60s --retries=3 \
    CMD /usr/local/bin/healthcheck.sh

VOLUME ["/var/lib/postgresql/data", "/var/log"]

ENTRYPOINT ["/usr/local/bin/entrypoint.sh"]
CMD ["/usr/bin/supervisord", "-n", "-c", "/etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf"]
